title: Globalize
body:
# Globalize Global datapacks for modpacks.

## 📔 About Globalize is a small, dependency free* mod that allows modpack creators to add global datapacks to their modpacks. All you need to do is put your datapack in the `datapacks` folder in your modpacks root directory and Globalize will automatically load it for you. *\*Technically, Globalize does use the `fabric-api-base` module, as it is required to load a mod at all. You still won't need to install it though, as it is built into the JAR.*
